title: T-097 — remove test-setup.ui.ts userEvent monkey-patch once user-event v15 ships (FT-037)
prompt:
# T-097 — remove test-setup.ui.ts userEvent monkey-patch once user-event v15 ships (FT-037)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5.y
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-037** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P3** (XS effort)

## Goal
Remove the userEvent monkey-patch once user-event v15 is on npm.

## Implementation contract
1. Bump @testing-library/user-event to ^15 in apps/web devDependencies.
2. Delete the monkey-patch block from test-setup.ui.ts.
3. Run UI tests; assert pass.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/test-setup.ui.ts [modify]
- apps/web/package.json [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given user-event v15 is on npm, when bumped in apps/web, then test-setup.ui.ts contains no monkey-patch.
2. Given the UI test suite, when run, then all tests pass with the new version.

## Test strategy
- RED: not applicable (upstream-blocked); regression test = existing suite.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run --config vitest.ui.config.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bump if upstream has not released v15.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.
